markdown:
#  Invoice Administrator Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Request to Unlock Signed Unconditional Waivers 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Commitments** tool.
  2. Locate the contract for the invoice with the signed unconditional lien waiver. Then click its **Number** link to open it.
  3. In the commitment, click the **Invoices** tab.
  4. Locate the invoice with the signed unconditional lien waiver. Then click the **Invoice #** link to open it.
  5. In the invoice's **General** tab, scroll down to the **Lien Waivers** card.
  6. _Optional._ To send an email request to unlock the unconditional lien waiver to the invoice contact on the commitment, click **Request**. ![Request To Unlock Unconditional Lien Waiver](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b4208d693aed7d59814c5c0e4c189344/9be98376301c3634c561ea3450bb82a1/request-to-unlock-unconditional-lien-waiver.png?fm=webp)
  7. At the **Send Request to Unlock Lien Waiver?** prompt, click **Send Request**. ![Send Request To Unlock Lien Waiver](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cc294c5d60212e91162c28e8ede920a7/53fdc9328e2902505b1d77ae04a9a9fd/send-request-to-unlock-lien-waiver.png?fm=webp) A GREEN banner appears to confirm that the system sent a request to unlock the lien waiver to all invoice contacts designated on the commitment. As shown below, the GRAY banner corresponding to the lien waiver shows the last requested date and time. ![Request Again Button Unconditional](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ac7872a6921ccfce06f93a916992fc72/9bb79d233d488e94d5968f1200098333/request-again-button-unconditional.png?fm=webp)
#####  Tip
**Need to send another request at a later time?** You can send another request at a later time by clicking the **Request Again** button.

description: This guide shows users with invoice administrators how to manage Procore Pay features with the Invoice Management tools in Procore. | Request to Unlock Signed Unconditional Waivers
